reasoning: The FedRAMP SC-7 (3) control focuses on boundary protection and ensuring that access points are secure. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network security controls such as NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that only authorized traffic is allowed. Additionally, securing ingress points with TLS and avoiding the use of NodePort services, which expose services directly to the internet, align with the control's intent to protect access points.
title: Boundary Protection | Access Points
